panels.description:
Number of GET requests made to all buckets and objects in the buckets of a region.

Unit: count
panels.title: GET Requests

panels.description:
Number of PUT requests made to all buckets and objects in the buckets of a region.

Unit: count
panels.title: PUT Requests

panels.description:
Average time from receiving a GET request to the time that the system starts to respond in a measurement period.

Unit: ms
panels.title: First Byte Download Delay

panels.description:
Number of server responses with 4\ *xx* status codes

Unit: count
panels.title: 4XX Status Codes

panels.description:
Number of server responses with 5\ *xx* status codes

Unit: count
panels.title: 5XX Status Codes

panels.description:
Average time from receiving a request to the time that the system response ends in a measurement period.

Unit: ms
panels.title: Average Request Latency

panels.description:
Average time required for calling a specific API in a request.

Unit: ms
panels.title: Average Request Callback Latency

panels.description:
Average number of requests per second in a statistical period.

Unit: count
panels.title: Total TPS

panels.description:
Average number of GET requests per second in a statistical period.

Unit: count
panels.title: GET Request TPS

panels.description:
Average number of PUT requests per second in a statistical period.

Unit: count
panels.title: PUT Request TPS

panels.description:
Average number of DELETE requests per second in a statistical period.

Unit: count
panels.title: DELETE Request TPS

panels.description:
Used to measure the availability of the storage service system. It refers to the percentage of non-server error requests (with status code 5\ *xx* returned) in the total request count. It is calculated as follows:

(1 - 5\ *xx* requests/Total requests) x 100%

Unit: %
panels.title: Request Success Rate

panels.description:
Validity of client requests. Percentage of the valid requests in the total requests. It is calculated as follows:

(Number of client requests whose returned status code is 2\ *xx* or 3\ *xx*/Total number of requests) x 100%

Unit: %
panels.title: Valid request rate

panels.description:
Percentage of the number of requests interrupted by a client to the total number of requests. It is calculated as follows:

(Number of requests interrupted by a client/Total number of requests) x 100%

Unit: %
panels.title: Request interruption rate
